name: Placental MSC-derived extracellular vesicles
summary: Placental MSC-derived extracellular vesicles are normalized for a knee osteoarthritis randomized trial in extracellular-vesicle therapy.
mechanism_summary: Delivers extracellular vesicles from placental mesenchymal stromal cells for local joint disease endpoints.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Placental MSC EVs did not beat placebo in knee osteoarthritis; Placental MSC extracellular vesicle knee osteoarthritis randomized trial.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
